ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How does X work?'})-[r1:TAGGED]->(tag:Tag {name: 'ComputerScience'}),
    p2 = (u:User {display_name: 'TechEnthusiast'})-[:ASKED]->q,
    p3 = (q)-[:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer {is_accepted: TRUE})-[:PROVIDED]->(u)
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How did the accepted answer to TechEnthusiast’s question about *How does X work?* align with the ‘ComputerScience’ tag, and what key concepts did it emphasize?

cypher: MATCH (q:Question {title: 'How does X work?'})<-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'ComputerScience'})\nMATCH (c:Comment)-[:COMMENTED_ON]->(q)\nRETURN a, t, c
